code: import{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Container,Nav}from'react-bootstrap';import CardCreator from'./components/CardCreator';import FlashcardView from'./components/FlashcardView';import'./App.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const STORAGE_KEY='memoryCardSet';function App(){const[cards,setCards]=useState(()=>{const saved=localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);return saved?JSON.parse(saved):[];});const[view,setView]=useState('create');useEffect(()=>{localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(cards));},[cards]);const addCard=(question,answer)=>{setCards(prev=>[...prev,{question,answer}]);};const clearCards=()=>{setCards([]);localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"min-vh-100 bg-light",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Container,{className:"py-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-center mb-4",children:"Memory Card Generator"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Nav,{variant:"tabs",className:"justify-content-center mb-4",activeKey:view,onSelect:setView,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Nav.Item,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Nav.Link,{eventKey:"create",children:"Create Cards"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Nav.Item,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Nav.Link,{eventKey:"review",disabled:cards.length===0,children:["Review Cards (",cards.length,")"]})})]}),view==='create'?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(CardCreator,{cards:cards,onAdd:addCard,onClear:clearCards,onStartReview:()=>setView('review')}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(FlashcardView,{cards:cards,onBack:()=>setView('create')})]})});}export default App;
